notes:
Fixed video element overflow issue by adding min-h-0 to all grid children inside the video container.

Root cause: CSS grid items have min-height: auto by default, allowing the video's intrinsic dimensions to expand the grid track beyond the container's padded content area.

Changes applied to both PHP and TSX files:

1. Poster button (line 70 PHP, line 325 TSX): Added min-h-0 to prevent button from expanding grid track
2. Video element (line 94 PHP, line 356 TSX): Added min-h-0 to prevent video intrinsic height from expanding grid track
3. Embed container div (line 101 PHP, line 373 TSX): Added min-h-0 to prevent iframe container from expanding grid track

All grid children now properly constrain to the container's content area (inside padding). Build passed successfully with only pre-existing performance warnings.
